purpose: Provide a degraded-mode readiness and stale-in-progress report from .beads/issues.jsonl without touching SQLite, br, or bv when tracker DB paths are locked or slow. Stale in-progress detection is based on latest visible issue activity, including issue comments, so recent work evidence is not misclassified as dead.
validation_commands: bash scripts/check_tracker_jsonl_degraded_readiness.sh --validate-only | jq -e '.safe_ready_ids == [] and (.permissioned_ready_ids | type == "array") and (.permissioned_ready_summary | type == "array") and (.blocked_open_ids | type == "array") and (.blocker_explanations | type == "array") and (.blocked_by_counts | type == "array") and (.top_blocker_ids | type == "array") and (.in_progress_ids | type == "array") and (.in_progress_age_summary | type == "array") and (.recommended_next_action.decision | type == "string")'

jq -e '.stdout_summary.safe_ready_ids == [] and (.stdout_summary.permissioned_ready_ids | type == "array") and (.stdout_summary.permissioned_ready_summary | type == "array") and (.stdout_summary.blocked_open_ids | type == "array") and (.stdout_summary.blocker_explanations | type == "array") and (.stdout_summary.blocked_by_counts | type == "array") and (.stdout_summary.top_blocker_ids | type == "array") and (.stdout_summary.in_progress_ids | type == "array") and (.stdout_summary.in_progress_age_summary | type == "array") and (.stdout_summary.recommended_next_action.decision | type == "string")' target/conformance/tracker_jsonl_degraded_readiness.report.json
